description:
Start your government contracting career: https://www.govclose.com

Writing a proposal that actually wins government contracts is a difficult skill set to master. 

This is the first of a seven-step video series on proposal writing for government contracts in this episode, we cover how to read a solicitation and then the big picture on what the government is looking for and what you should be looking for within the solicitation. We'll cover the overview of building a compliance matrix. What sections are important in the solicitation, and what we should be looking at to make a go/no-go decision. 

Part 2:  how to make the go/no-go decision step-by-step. 

Part Three: Building a Compliance Matrix, which will serve as your proposal writing engine. 


Watch next:
A Contracting Officer's Advice on Proposal Writing:
https://youtu.be/bcHPij1WnFs

SOURCES SOUGHT
https://youtu.be/tTnkkLsOD6M?si=pSAAAdL0CdW4qNPb



FREE Federal Sales Training: https://www.govclose.com
#rfp  #rfq #compliancematrix
